title: Special Collections | NIH News in Health
content: Special Collections Collections of stories from past issues based on popular topics. Healthy Habits Build Social Bonds to Protect Health: The Power of Personal Connections Get Active Together: Social Support Can Help Keep You Moving Dejunking Your Diet: The Drawbacks of Ultra-Processed Foods Healthy Weight Control: Balancing Eating and Exercise Healthy Social Media Habits: How You Use It Matters Step It Up!: Get Active for Your Health Mindfulness for Your Health: The Benefits of Living Moment by Moment Good Sleep for Good Health: Get the Rest You Need Practicing Gratitude: Ways to Improve Positivity Parenting Addressing Childhood Obesity: Give Kids a Healthy Start Decoding Dyslexia: Helping Kids Who Struggle With Reading Addressing Childhood Bullying: When Peer Aggression Goes Too Far Delivering Safer Pregnancies: Lower Your Risk of Health Problems Healthy Mouth for Kids: Start Early to Protect Tooth Health Delving Into Devices: Children and Screen Time The Power of Peers: Who Influences Your Health? Safe Driving: Protecting Yourself Behind the Wheel Parenting Teens: Guiding Kids Through Turbulent Years Positive Parenting: Building Healthy Relationships With Your Kids Keeping Up in School?: Identifying Learning Problems Older Adults The Hazards of Hypothermia: Stay Warm in Cold Weather Taking the Pedal Off the Metal: When Should Older Adults Stop Driving? Beat the Heat: Staying Safe in the Summertime Chronic Disease in Uncertain Times: Be Prepared and Plan Ahead Maintain Your Muscle: Strength Training at Any Age A Well-Aged Mind: Maintaining Your Cognitive Health Preventing Falls: Tips to Keep You on Your Feet Coping with Caregiving: Take Care of Yourself While Caring for Others Osteoporosis in Aging: Protect Your Bones with Exercise You’re Never Too Old: Keep Active as You Age Getting It Straight: Improve Your Posture for Better Health
